body:
Update ClimaCoupler to use ClimaOcean 0.10.0. 
1) Adds the TripolarGrid ocean configuration. 
2) Removes Lat-long grid as part of standard CMIP configurations, removes polar masking functions
3) Uses ConservativeRegridding0.2.5 which introduces consistent spectral element remapping. 
4) Updates CMIP runs to use `float64` clock. Future PRs will re-introduce the ITime clock following changes across ocean repositories.
title: Update to ClimaOcean 0.10.0
